heading: Removal of beer in containers or by pipeline
label: 5412 Removal of beer in containers or by pipeline
text: Beer may be removed from the brewery for consumption or sale only in hogsheads, packages, and similar containers, marked, branded, or labeled in such manner as the Secretary may by regulation require, except that beer may be removed from the brewery pursuant to section 5414 or by pipeline to contiguous distilled spirits plants under section 5222.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5412, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 675Pub. L. 85–859

Amendments2017— inserted “pursuant to section 5414 or” before “by pipeline”.Pub. L. 115–971976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–4551971— substituted “packages,” for “barrels, kegs, bottles,”.Pub. L. 91–673

Effective Date of 2017 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–97, title I, § 13803(c)131 Stat. 2173Dec. 22, 2017“The amendments made by this section [amending this section and ] shall apply to any calendar quarters beginning after .”section 5414 of this titleDecember 31, 2017

Effective Date of 1971 AmendmentAmendment by effective on first day of first calendar month which begins more than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 91–673section 5 of Pub. L. 91–673section 5056 of this titleJan. 12, 1971
